title: Dubai news: Police close 4 roads after drone hits fuel tank near Dubai International Airport
summary_full: A drone strike on a fuel storage tank near Dubai International Airport sparked a large fire early Monday, leading authorities to shut down four major roads. Flight operations were briefly suspended as emergency teams controlled the blaze, with no injuries reported. The incident occurred amid rising regional tensions, with security analysts noting increased targeting of critical infrastructure.
